name: Layer Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 35°C.
2. Core and slice the apples into eighths.
3. Place the sliced apples in a large bowl and sprinkle with the cinnamon and 5 tablespoons sugar.
4. In another bowl, beat eggs and gradually add the remaining sugar, oil, orange juice, and vanilla.
5. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Combine the egg mixture with the dry ingredients.
7. Grease a tube pan and dust with sifted flour.
8. Pour 1/3 of the batter into the pan.
9. Layer with 1/3 of the apples. Repeat for two more layers, ending with apples on top.
10. Bake for 1 1/2 hours until golden brown on top.
11. Let cool a few minutes and then unmold.
